allow: PowerShell(Get-Command python3.11, python3.12, python3.13, python311, python312 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -c "CREATE USER chituser WITH PASSWORD 'chitpass';" 2>&1)

PowerShell($hba = "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\data\\pg_hba.conf"; [System.IO.File]::GetAccessControl\($hba\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Access | Select-Object IdentityReference, FileSystemRights, AccessControlType } 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 10)
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "chitpass"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -U chituser -d finance_db -c "SELECT current_user, current_database\(\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq "" -and \($_.ProcessName -eq "python" -or $_.ProcessName -eq "node"\) } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host "Killed old processes")
